title: Job Search Operating System, Experiments, and Sustainable Throughput · Claim Audit: Cadence Capacity
summary: A candidate relies on browser tabs and memory, duplicates work, misses follow-ups, exposes sensitive notes, and changes tactics after every outcome. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cadence capacity increment in privacy-preserving search decision system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
Store only decision-necessary opportunity, contact, consent, artifact revision, deadline, outcome, and learning data with retention rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity
steps.instruction:
theory case — A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Cadence Capacity contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review. For Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity, keep Cadence Capacity connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Cadence Capacity condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines — Controls accessible portfolio and application artifacts while distinguishing automated checks from knowledgeable human and assistive-technology evaluation.

hints: For Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Cadence Capacity precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Cadence Capacity · Theory Cadence Capacity, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Application count is the best measure of search quality.

options.text: Application count is the best measure of search quality. That claim fails the predict cadence capacity evidence boundary for Cadence Capacity.

For predict cadence capacity, apply Cadence Capacity without its stated preconditions, omit the privacy-preserving search decision system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Cadence Capacity for privacy-preserving search decision system.
Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Cadence Capacity while producing privacy-preserving search decision system.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The worked example variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review. A defensible solution applies Cadence Capacity, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to privacy-preserving search decision system.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-cadence-capacity — Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
focus: career-cadence-capacity
decision-evidence: Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Application count is the best measure of search quality. This fails the Cadence Capacity contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG 2.2 Recommendation; ISO IEC 40500:2025) — Controls accessible portfolio and application artifacts while distinguishing automated checks from knowledgeable human and assistive-technology evaluation.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
